notes: Hotfix for v0.1.17 black-screen-on-PLAY: _rebuild_crosshair_tex had strict-typing parse errors (clamp/max return Variant, inferred-Variant warning is treated as error). Export still produced binaries but the script failed to load at runtime. All locals now explicitly typed. Click-after-match crash root-cause fix from v0.1.17 + crosshair size slider + AAA top-bar profile all carried forward.
launcher_notes: Hardened self-update flow on Windows. Manifest now served from pulsewavegame.com with 30s cache.
